changes: 1-Click In-App Auto-Update: Automatically downloads installer and runs Terminal auto-update flow.
Standardized bundle identifier to com.aoh.rec across app bundle, Info.plist, and installer.
Added persistent saving and restoration of last selected recording area across app relaunches.
Added live pixel dimension readout during region selection.
Fixed UI issue causing dark corners on the floating control panel.
Fixed crash when using camera overlay (missing NSCameraUsageDescription).
Added global keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+Shift+R to Record, Cmd+Shift+P to Pause).
Added native ScreenCaptureKit and AVAssetWriter recording.
Added internal audio and microphone capture.
Added floating control panel and countdown timer.
